note: composite_v1 K=20 EW, no regime. Regime gate broken (SPY in EXCLUDE). Fixed by computing SPY stats from daily prices.
lgbm_smooth K=20 inv_vol + regime_200ma. SPY regime now working, 30 cash months. Sharpe jump from 1.30->1.63.
lgbm K=40 inv_vol + regime_200ma. Min-var weighting didn't help. Vol-triggered regime: same result. Sharpe ceiling ~1.68.
IC analysis: LGBM pct_positive=45.8%, composite=42.5%, smooth=44.7% — all below 50%. Sharpe-target model underperforms. Performance driven by regime timing + mild survivorship bias, not alpha.
lgbm K=50 inv_vol + regime_200ma. No config passes CAGR>=50% AND Sharpe>=2.0. Sharpe wall is ~1.68. More K reduces CAGR too fast.
next_action: Try volatility targeting, cross-sectional sector rotation, or factor timing to break Sharpe ceiling

note: SPY vol-based scaling: scale=min(target_vol/spy_vol_21d,1.0). regime_loose gives 23 cash months vs 30 for strict. Best: lgbm K=50 inv_vol + vt18% + regime_loose → CAGR=56.9%, Sharpe=1.74. Vol targeting improves Sharpe by ~0.06 units vs exp_005.
Stock-level trend filters: d_sma200 > threshold and rs_6m_spy > 0. Best: lgbm K=50 + rs6m>0 + vt18% + regime_loose → CAGR=55.0%, Sharpe=1.76. rs filter helps marginally. d_sma200 filter hurts CAGR.
Two-way blend: lgbm×(1-w)+sharpe_12m×w. Best at w=0.30: K=40, vt18%, loose → CAGR=58.3%, Sharpe=1.80, ratio=0.519. Sharpe_12m IC=+0.043 adds genuine signal on top of LGBM.

Three-way blend: LGBM×0.70+sh12×0.20+sh5y×0.10. Best: K=30 + vt18% + loose → CAGR=63.1%, Sharpe=1.82, MaxDD=-13.6%, mean_m=4.48%, std_m=8.51%, ratio=0.527. NEW BEST. Sharpe_5y IC=+0.04 adds additional lift.

WalkForwardLGBMSharpeTarget: train on rank(fwd_ret/vol_12m). Pure Sharpe-target LGBM: CAGR=39%, Sharpe=1.64. Best ensemble (70% std + 30% Sharpe-target): Sharpe=1.76. Worse than exp_009. Risk-adjusted ranking degrades signal quality.

Pure high-IC signals: breakout_strength_60 IC=0.088, crt_6m IC=0.081, sharpe_12m IC=0.043. Pure breakout_60 K=20: CAGR=47%, Sharpe=1.71 (fails CAGR gate). LGBM×0.40+highIC K=30: CAGR=60.9%, Sharpe=1.77 (worse than exp_009 1.82). High-IC signals select lower-return stocks; LGBM momentum drives CAGR.

ERC and alternative weighting. ERC (equal risk contribution): vol higher than inv_vol (34.5% vs 29.5%), Sharpe 1.77-1.79 — WORSE. inv_vol² (double inv_vol): ann_vol=25.9%, Sharpe=1.831, CAGR=54.6%. inv_vol capped at 5%: CAGR=65.1%, Sharpe=1.834 — MARGINAL IMPROVEMENT. Ratio stuck at 0.529 vs target 0.577. Need fundamentally different approach.

Portfolio-level realized vol targeting (3m lookback) + drawdown protection. Best: spy18%+port_vt=25% K=30 → CAGR=56.9%, Sharpe=1.836. Key finding: scaling cuts both mean_m and std_m proportionally → ratio unchanged at 0.530. Drawdown protection reduces MaxDD (-8.3%) without improving Sharpe.

Computed OOS IC for all 79 features 2007-2021. Top in active months: rank_now=0.223 (look-ahead suspect), ret_21d=0.221 (in LGBM), breakout=0.159, crt_3m=0.135, prerunner_dist=0.137, vol_asym_60=0.105. crt_3m, prerunner_dist, vol_asym_60 are untried.

Added crt_3m (IC=0.135), prerunner_dist (IC=0.137), vol_asym_60 (IC=0.105) to blend. NEW BEST: 4way+volasym10% K=30 → CAGR=66.5%, Sharpe=1.841, ratio=0.5315. Signal blending ceiling confirmed: no blend combination breaks ratio>0.532. Sharpe 2.0 requires structural change.
